title: Your Model Organisms Might Be Fried
summary: Your Model Organisms Might Be Fried
whyItMatters: Context: We are the ‘model motivations’ team at Arcadia Alignment. We aim to build a science of ‘ model intentions ’, unifying insights from personas and other empirical evidence.
